display.description: Opening Range Breakout (ORB): enter long on a volume-confirmed break of the first 30-minute high; always flat by EOD

range_minutes.description: Length of the opening range window (minutes from session open)

vol_multiple.description: Breakout bar volume must exceed avg-range-bar volume by this multiple

profit_target_r.description: Profit target in R-multiples (stop distance multiples)

hard_stop_pct.description: Hard stop distance as % of entry

eod_exit_time.description: Exchange-local HH:MM to flatten any open position
